hero.lede: GoPay · OVO · DANA · ShopeePay · QRIS · Bank Transfer — all in one app, Rp 38,000/month. 0% commission. Customers order from WhatsApp, you keep 100% of what you sell.
pain.h2: Stop losing money and orders to…
indo.sub: Most 'POS' apps come from the US and charge in dollars. We built this in Indonesia, for the way Indonesian customers actually buy donuts.
indo.payments.head: 💳 Local payments
indo.payments.title: All Indonesian payment methods
indo.payments.desc: GoPay, OVO, DANA, ShopeePay, QRIS, virtual account, cards, bank transfer. Connect Midtrans or Xendit directly — funds go straight to your account, not to us.
indo.price.head: 💸 MSME pricing
indo.price.title: Rp 38,000 per month. Everything included.
indo.price.desc: No commission per order. No setup fee. No credit card needed. Compare: Shopify Rp 500,000+ per month, GrabFood takes 20-30% per order, ChatRestaurant isn't here yet.
indo.tax.head: 📜 Tax-ready out of the box
indo.tax.title: PPN 11% + Faktur Pajak
indo.tax.desc: PPN 11% preset. NPWP & invoice number generated automatically on every receipt. 4 invoice templates — pick the one your accountant prefers. Auto-sent to the customer's WhatsApp after payment.
indo.lang.head: 💬 Bahasa Indonesia
indo.lang.title: Customers see the menu in Bahasa
indo.lang.desc: Customer-facing app fully in Bahasa Indonesia. English available too — tourists in Bali or expats in Jakarta switch with one tap.
indo.data.head: 📱 Data + RAM friendly
indo.data.title: Runs on cheap Android phones
indo.data.desc: PWA = only 2MB, not 200MB like native apps. Customer on 2GB-RAM phone? Still smooth. Customer in a remote area with slow signal? Still orders.
indo.complete.head: 🎯 Already complete
indo.complete.title: No locked features in the Standard plan
indo.complete.desc: Loyalty stamps, marketing banners, promo codes, KDS for the kitchen, A4 invoices, tip handling, mix-and-match dozen, customer accounts, kiosk mode — all included at Rp 38,000. Upgrade to Pro only if you need multi-staff or automation.
features.sub: Built specifically for donut shops — not another generic e-commerce template.

features.menuCards.desc: Photos, descriptions, prices, allergens — customise card layout (grid / horizontal / full-width).

features.whatsapp.desc: Customers order through the WhatsApp number you already use. No new app to learn.
features.delivery.title: Delivery + pickup
features.delivery.desc: Zones, per-km rates, free-above thresholds, max-distance — all in your hands.
features.payments.title: Multiple payment methods
features.payments.desc: Bank transfer, e-wallet (GoPay / OVO / Dana), or cash on delivery — you choose.
features.reviews.title: Verified reviews
features.reviews.desc: Only customers with a real order ref number can leave a review. No spam.
features.brand.title: Total brand control
features.brand.desc: Your logo, colours, fonts, hero text, custom landing splash. Edit live, see live.
features.multiLang.title: Multi-language
features.multiLang.desc: English + Indonesian out of the box. Vietnamese, Malay, Filipino coming Q3 2026.
features.promotions.title: Promotions + deals
features.promotions.desc: BUY1GET1, % off, time-limited, free-delivery thresholds, scrolling promo banners.
demo.sub: This is the actual product running in your browser. Place an order. Pick a donut. See how it feels from a customer's side.
pricing.sub: Start small, upgrade only when you need more. 0% commission on every tier. No setup fee. No card upfront.

All 16 payment gateways (Midtrans · QRIS · GoPay · OVO · DANA · Stripe …)
Delivery + pickup zones with per-km pricing
Social-ready PNG export (Instagram · WhatsApp · Facebook · TikTok)
Promo codes (% off · flat off · expiry)

pricing.pro.pitch: Loyalty, thermal printer, custom domain, in-app chat, tipping, and SMS / email campaigns.

pricing.enterprise.pitch: KDS, kiosk mode, production planner, catering, multi-location, unlimited staff.
trust.sub.lead: StreetLocal is live in Indonesia. Donut sellers are moving fast — from renting shelves on GrabFood, GoFood, and Shopee to running their own branded app, with their own customer list and 0% commission.
reviews.cta.line: Send us your review and get listed in our review section.
beyond.h2.line2: Apple App Store. Google Play. Custom features.
beyond.sub: The Rp 38,000 monthly plan gets your PWA live in minutes. When you're ready to grow — branded native app, custom integrations, NFC loyalty — we handle those as paid add-ons. Same StreetLocal team, beyond-the-subscription delivery.
beyond.native.title: Your bakery in the App Store
beyond.native.desc: We build your branded native app — your name, your logo, your colours — and submit it to Apple App Store and Google Play under your bakery's own developer account. You own the listing, reviews, and payouts. Customers find you in their phone's store.
beyond.native.bullets: Branded build with your logo + splash screen
App icons, screenshots, store listing copy
Submission to Apple + Google on your behalf
Apple Developer ($99/yr) + Google Play ($25 one-time) paid directly to them, in your name
beyond.custom.title: Build what you need
beyond.custom.desc: If your shop has a specific workflow — wholesale catering portal, accounting export, NFC tap-to-stamp loyalty, beacon promos near your door — we build it as a custom engagement. Same StreetLocal codebase under the hood, your specific business logic on top.
beyond.custom.bullets: NFC loyalty taps (no app open needed for stamps)
Beacon-triggered offers when customers walk past
Multi-app management for chains with 5+ locations
faq.list: Is this an app? Why a PWA and not a native app?

Yes — it's a Progressive Web App (PWA), and PWAs ARE apps. Your customer taps your link once, adds it to their home screen, and from then on it opens in one tap with a real app icon, splash screen, and full-screen experience — just like Gojek or Instagram. The difference is install size: ~2MB instead of 100–200MB for a typical native app. That gap is exactly why we chose PWA for the Indonesian market. Most customers carry Android phones with 2–4GB RAM and storage already half-full with WhatsApp, photos, and TikTok. A native app forces them through Play Store search, install, approval, and update loops, costs them mobile data they pay for per-GB, and competes for storage they don't have to spare. A PWA skips all of that — open your link, tap 'Add to Home Screen', done. It updates silently every visit (no Play Store review delay when you change a menu price), works offline after first load because everything caches locally, and loads on slow EDGE/3G in rural areas. Twitter Lite, Pinterest, Starbucks, and BookMyShow all run PWAs in emerging markets for exactly the same reasons. If a competitor tells you "this isn't a real app" — they're describing the legacy native approach that bleeds orders to Play Store friction in Indonesia. We chose PWA on purpose, for the customer who actually places the order on a mid-range Android.
Do my customers need to download an app?
No. Your donut shop opens in any web browser on any phone. Customers just tap your link — no install, no signup needed.
How do I get paid?
Bank transfer, e-wallet (GoPay, OVO, Dana), or cash on delivery. You set which methods you accept. Money goes directly to your account — we never touch it.
Do you take a commission?
No. 0% per order. The Rp 38,000 / month is the only fee. Sell 1 donut or 10,000 — the price stays the same.
What if I want to cancel?
Cancel anytime from your dashboard. No questions, no calls, no "are you sure" loops. Your data exports to CSV before deletion.
Can I import my existing menu?
Yes. Paste from a spreadsheet, or add donuts one-by-one in 30 seconds each. Most shops get their full menu live in under 10 minutes.
Is my data secure?
Yes. Daily encrypted backups, HTTPS everywhere, and we never share customer data with third parties. You own everything.
Can I use my own domain (like mydonuts.com)?
Yes — included on Professional and Enterprise plans. We help you point it. Or use the free streetlocal.live/yourshop subdomain.
What languages are supported?
English + Indonesian, fully translated. Vietnamese, Malay, and Filipino are on the roadmap for Q3 2026.
Can I run promotions or deals?
Yes — BUY1GET1, percentage-off, time-limited, free-delivery-above thresholds, scrolling promo banners. All built in.
Can my donut shop be in the Apple App Store and Google Play?

Yes — as a paid add-on. We build your branded native app (your name, your logo, your colours) and submit to both stores under your bakery's own developer account. From Rp 2.5M / $499 one-time + Rp 350k / $29 per month. You own the listing, the reviews, and the payouts. See the "Beyond the monthly plan" section above for details.
Who owns the app if I get a native build?

You own the store listing, your customer data, and your developer accounts. We retain ownership of the source code — your build is a licensed binary, not a code transfer. If you cancel, the live app keeps working but stops receiving updates.
Do Apple or Google take a cut when customers buy donuts?

No. Donuts are physical goods — Apple's 30% and Google's 30% only apply to digital goods. You keep using your existing payment gateway and 100% of the donut sale (minus your gateway's normal processing fee).
Can I request a custom feature?
Yes. Common requests like NFC loyalty taps, beacon-based store offers, custom delivery integrations, and accounting-software bridges are quoted per project. Email us with what you need.
Who do I contact if I need help?
WhatsApp support 9 AM – 9 PM WIB. Average response time: 12 minutes. Most issues solved in the first reply.
